006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.config.internal;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
027
028/**
029 * Represents a single entry in a configuration.
030 *
031 * This is a read-only object.
032 */
033@SuppressWarnings({
034   "java:S1206" // Internal config representation; value equality not needed
035})
036public class ConfigMapEntry {
037   static final ConfigMapEntry NULL = new ConfigMapEntry(null, null, null, null, null);
038   private static final AsciiSet REPLACE_CHARS = AsciiSet.of("\\#");
039   final String rawLine;
040   final String key;
041   final String value;
042   final String comment;
043
044   final String modifiers;
045
046   final List<String> preLines;
047
048   ConfigMapEntry(String line, List<String> preLines) {
049      this.rawLine = line;
050      var i = line.indexOf('=');
051      var key2 = line.substring(0, i).trim();
052
053      var m1 = key2.indexOf('<');
054      var m2 = key2.indexOf('>');
055
056      modifiers = nullIfEmpty((m1 > -1 && m2 > m1) ? key2.substring(m1 + 1, m2) : null);
057
058      this.key = m1 == -1 ? key2 : key2.substring(0, m1);
059
060      line = line.substring(i + 1);
061
062      i = line.indexOf('#');
063      if (i != -1) {
064         var l2 = splita(line, '#', 2);
065         line = l2[0];
066         if (l2.length == 2)
067            this.comment = l2[1].trim();
068         else
069            this.comment = null;
070      } else {
071         this.comment = null;
072      }
073
074      this.value = replaceUnicodeSequences(line.trim());
075
076      this.preLines = u(copyOf(preLines));
077   }
078
079   ConfigMapEntry(String key, String value, String modifiers, String comment, List<String> preLines) {
080      this.rawLine = null;
081      this.key = key;
082      this.value = value;
083      this.comment = comment;
084      this.modifiers = modifiers;
085      this.preLines = preLines == null ? Collections.emptyList() : u(copyOf(preLines));
086   }
087
088   /**
089    * Returns the same-line comment of this entry.
090    *
091    * @return The same-line comment of this entry.
092    */
093   public String getComment() { return comment; }
094
095   /**
096    * Returns the name of this entry.
097    *
098    * @return The name of this entry.
099    */
100   public String getKey() { return key; }
101
102   /**
103    * Returns the modifiers for this entry.
104    *
105    * @return The modifiers for this entry, or <jk>null</jk> if it has no modifiers.
106    */
107   public String getModifiers() { return modifiers; }
108
109   /**
110    * Returns the pre-lines of this entry.
111    *
112    * @return The pre-lines of this entry as an unmodifiable list.
113    */
114   public List<String> getPreLines() { return preLines; }
115
116   /**
117    * Returns the raw value of this entry.
118    *
119    * @return The raw value of this entry.
120    */
121   public String getValue() { return value; }
122
123   @SuppressWarnings({
124      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for config entry writer
125   })
126   Writer writeTo(Writer w) throws IOException {
127      if (value == null)
128         return w;
129      for (var pl : preLines)
130         w.append(pl).append('\n');
131      if (nn(rawLine)) {
132         for (var i = 0; i < rawLine.length(); i++) {
133            var c = rawLine.charAt(i);
134            if (c == '\n')
135               w.append('\n').append('\t');
136            else if (c != '\r') // HTT - '\r' in raw line requires OS-level carriage return in stored config content
137               w.append(c);
138         }
139         w.append('\n');
140      } else {
141         w.append(key);
142         if (nn(modifiers))
143            w.append('<').append(modifiers).append('>');
144         w.append(" = ");
145
146         var val = value;
147         for (var i = 0; i < val.length(); i++) {
148            var c = val.charAt(i);
149            if (c == '\n')
150               w.append('\n').append('\t');
151            else if (c != '\r') { // HTT - '\r' in value requires OS-level carriage return injection
152               if (REPLACE_CHARS.contains(c) || (Character.isISOControl(c) && ! (c == '\n' || c == '\r' || c == '\t'))) { // HTT - some branch combinations (e.g. '\r' in isISOControl) are unreachable due to the outer '\r' check
153                  w.append(unicodeSequence(c));
154               } else {
155                  w.append(c);
156               }
157            }
158         }
159
160         if (ne(comment))
161            w.append(" # ").append(comment);
162
163         w.append('\n');
164      }
165      return w;
166   }
167}
